summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Dota 2 Polymarket arbitrage bot. All 8 specified API endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate. GSI data processing and game state updates working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: AssetType.USDC attribute error logged during balance fetch (fixed automatically)
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - balance API working correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/health - API health check (polymarket_connected: true, gsi_connected: false)
GET /api/balance - Polymarket balance retrieval (balance: 0, allowances retrieved)
GET /api/bot/status - Status with game_state (includes config and current state)
POST /api/gsi - GSI data reception and game_state update (match_id, game_time updated correctly)
GET /api/markets/dota2 - Dota 2 market fetching (2 markets found)
GSI data processing - Gold advantage calculation working
Configuration changes - Threshold updates applied correctly
Edge case handling - Invalid/empty GSI data handled gracefully
Polymarket integration - Balance and market APIs functional
success_percentage: backend: 100%, frontend: N/A (backend only testing requested)
